title: [LowerSeqToSV][SV] Simplify array register initialization using `for` operation
body: https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/eb2398bb5e762f69e409d2fb4e494993228bcab6 changed array register initializations to initialize each element instead of assign large integers. Since that explodes output verilog size, ideally we want to use SystemVerilog "for" statement in a similar way to HWMemSimpl: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/eb2398bb5e762f69e409d2fb4e494993228bcab6/lib/Dialect/SV/Transforms/HWMemSimImpl.cpp#L494-L496.  HWMemSimpl uses sv.verbatim to construct for statement but it would be better to introduce sv.for operation and replace the initialization code of LowerToSV and HWMemSImpl with sv.for.
